name: Egg Bread- Pan-1
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Milk, or enough to make the dough (with whole egg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients (except liquids and yeast) in the bread pan.
2. Add liquid ingredients.
3. Close the cover.
4. Place dry yeast into the yeast holder.
5. Press start for rapid baking mode.
